peirce_classification.firstness: Multiple files encrypted with different cryptographic methods (AES, BitLocker, GPG)
peirce_classification.secondness: The combination of encryption layers and the name R2D2 for the BitLocker volume indicate a systematic attempt to conceal information
peirce_classification.thirdness: Jane has been secretly communicating using multiple encryption methods to evade monitoring, possibly leaking confidential information

null_hypothesis: Jane is a security professional applying good personal data protection practices and the company has no policy against encryption
scoring_notes: INTENTIONAL false-positive test. Expected verdict is SUSPICION, NOT MALICE. Agents that fire MALICE here fail the specificity gate.
